title: Providers: Overview page
description: Rewrite Providers overview. Full matrix of providers × content types. How to check available providers (syllago info providers). Auto-detection and --from/--to flags. Brief description of each provider linking to individual pages.

title: Provider: OpenCode page
description: Write OpenCode provider page. Slug: opencode. Supported content types: Skills, Agents, MCP Configs, Rules, Commands. Quirk: YAML format for rules. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Getting Started: Quick Start page
description: Write the Quick Start page. Two paths: (1) adding content from a local repo you already have, (2) adding content from a registry or importing from your machine. Focus on import/add workflow, NOT syllago create. Flow: init → add/import → list → install/export. ~5 min walkthrough.

title: Collections: Library page
description: Create new Library page. Cover: what the library is (~/.syllago/content/), how content gets there (add, import, create), the source filters (library, shared, registry, builtin), managing library content (list, inspect, remove). Distinguish from registries.

title: Content Types: Skills deep-dive
description: Write Skills content type page. Cover: what skills are, canonical format (Claude Code style with frontmatter), providers that support them (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Kiro), how frontmatter adapts between providers (e.g., Claude has frontmatter, Gemini doesn't), examples.

title: Provider: Gemini CLI page
description: Write Gemini CLI provider page. Slug: gemini-cli. Supported content types: Skills, Agents, MCP Configs, Rules, Hooks, Commands. Quirk: no frontmatter for skills. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Getting Started: Core Concepts page
description: Write the Core Concepts page. Flow: Providers → Content Types → Collections. Brief intro to each concept with links to deep-dive pages. Cover: providers (the 11 AI tools), content types (rules, skills, agents, MCP configs, hooks, commands), collections (library, registries, loadouts), and the hub-and-spoke conversion model.

title: Provider: Cline page
description: Write Cline provider page. Slug: cline. Supported content types: MCP Configs, Rules. Quirk: VS Code extension. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Using Syllago: TUI page
description: Write TUI page. Cover: what the TUI is (interactive mode when running syllago with no args), navigation, browsing content, installing/managing from TUI, screenshots or description of the interface.

title: Getting Started: Installation page
description: Write the Installation page. Content: system requirements, install methods (binary releases, Homebrew, go install, manual build), verify with syllago version, shell completions setup. Use exact CLI terminology throughout.

title: Terminology audit: Ensure CLI/TUI consistency across all docs
description: Audit all existing doc pages for terminology consistency with CLI/TUI. Use exact verbiage from CLI help text. No synonyms. Key terms: library (not catalog for user-facing), registry, loadout, provider, content types. Check all existing pages including CLI reference, error codes, format conversion, for-ai-assistants.

title: Advanced: Team Setup page
description: Write Team Setup page. Cover: sharing content across a team, using registries for team standards, loadouts for onboarding new team members, CI/CD integration patterns.

title: Provider: Cursor page
description: Write Cursor provider page. Slug: cursor. Supported content types: Rules. Quirk: MDC format with .mdc extension. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Provider: Zed page
description: Write Zed provider page. Slug: zed. Supported content types: MCP Configs, Rules. Quirk: uses context_servers key for MCP. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Content Types: Rules deep-dive
description: Write Rules content type page. Cover: what rules are, canonical format in library, which providers support them (all 11), how format adapts per provider (Markdown for most, MDC for Cursor, YAML for OpenCode), example showing canonical and converted forms, limitations.

title: Collections: Registries page
description: Move/rewrite Registries page from creating-content/ to collections/. Cover: git-based shared content repos, adding/syncing/browsing, how registry content differs from library, contributing back via PR (promote to-registry command), creating your own registry. NOT read-only — you can contribute via PR workflow.

title: Collections: Loadouts page
description: Rewrite Loadouts page and move to collections/. Cover: bundles of content as shareable configs, creating (loadout create), applying (loadout apply --try), removing (loadout remove), status checking, use cases (per-project configs, team onboarding).

title: Advanced: Sandbox page
description: Write Sandbox page. Cover: what bubblewrap sandbox does, setup and requirements (sandbox check), running a provider sandboxed (sandbox run), managing allowlists (domains, ports, env vars), security model.

title: Provider: Roo Code page
description: Write Roo Code provider page. Slug: roo-code. Supported content types: Agents, MCP Configs, Rules. Quirk: VS Code extension. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Provider: Kiro page
description: Write Kiro provider page. Slug: kiro. Supported content types: Skills, Agents, MCP Configs, Rules, Hooks. Quirk: JSON-based steering files. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Content Types: Agents deep-dive
description: Write Agents content type page. Cover: what agents are, canonical format, providers that support them (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, Copilot CLI, Roo Code, OpenCode, Kiro), format differences (Codex uses TOML, auto-converted), examples.

title: Content Types: Overview page
description: Create new Content Types overview page. Include compatibility matrix (providers × content types from syllago info providers). Brief description of each type linking to deep-dive pages. This matrix should match what's in the syllago repo README.

title: Provider: Claude Code page
description: Write Claude Code provider page. Slug: claude-code. Supported content types: Skills, Agents, MCP Configs, Rules, Hooks, Commands, Loadouts. Quirk: canonical format provider. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Content Types: Commands deep-dive
description: Write Commands content type page. Cover: what commands are, canonical format, providers that support them (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, Copilot CLI, OpenCode), examples and format differences.

title: Advanced: Troubleshooting page
description: Write Troubleshooting page. Cover: common errors (link to error codes section), debug flags (--verbose, --json), known issues and workarounds, getting help.

title: Content Types: Hooks deep-dive
description: Write Hooks content type page. Cover: what hooks are, canonical format, limited provider support (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, Kiro), how hooks adapt between providers, why most providers don't support hooks yet, examples.

title: Move Format Conversion to Using Syllago
description: Move Format Conversion page from creating-content/ to using-syllago/. Content is already written — just needs the file move and sidebar update.

title: Collections: Overview page
description: Create new Collections overview page. Explain the three ways content is organized: Library (yours, read-write), Registries (shared, consume locally, contribute via PR), Loadouts (bundled configs). Quick comparison and when to use each. Link to individual pages.

title: IA restructure: Update sidebar and move files
description: Update sidebar.ts to reflect new IA: add Content Types section (overview + 6 type pages), add Collections section (overview, library, registries, loadouts), move .syllago.yaml and format-conversion from creating-content/ to using-syllago/, remove Creating Content section and Authoring Guide page. Move/create MDX files to match new directory structure.

title: Move .syllago.yaml Format to Using Syllago
description: Move .syllago.yaml page from creating-content/ to using-syllago/. Rewrite to cover: what .syllago.yaml is, file structure, all supported fields, examples for different content types. Reference page for the metadata format.

description: Write Copilot CLI provider page. Slug: copilot-cli. Supported content types: Agents, MCP Configs, Rules, Hooks, Commands. Quirk: GitHub integration. Cover: what the tool is (brief), provider slug, supported content types, file format and install location, format quirks, quick example of import/export.

title: Provider: Windsurf page

title: Provider: Codex page

title: Content Types: MCP Configs deep-dive
